message:
Review and improve plan beads: descriptions, tests, dependencies

- 68 beads reviewed, 17 descriptions improved with paper citations,
  Rust crate guidance, structured logging requirements
- 5 new test beads created (LeanStore, Parallel WAL, S3-FIFO, EBR, SSI)
- 5 new dependency edges wired
- Zero dependency cycles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
